code.text: Specimen information

text.div:
Specimen information

Test15-JUN-2023Specimen
Appearance of UrineCloudy urineUrine
Odor of UrineUrine smell ammoniacalUrine
Clarity of UrineTranslucentUrine
Color of UrineBrown colorUrine

Annotation

Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us
The patient shows elevated serum creatinine, low total CO₂, and significant proteinuria, suggesting possible renal dysfunction. Urine findings (cloudy, brown, low specific gravity, high protein, bilirubin, glucose, and ketones) further support renal impairment, possibly with tubular involvement. HbA1c is low, which may reflect recent hypoglycemia or anemia. Recommend urgent nephrology evaluation and further assessment for underlying renal and metabolic disorders.
